name: News
description: Fetch the latest news headlines by country and language. Uses Google News RSS (free, no API key required). Adapts to the user's configured language automatically.
examples: Give me the latest headlines in France
Show me US news about climate change

commands.name: news
commands.description: Use the news_fetch tool to get the latest top headlines. Adapt the country and language to the user's configured preferences if known. If the user wrote text after /news, treat it as a topic filter. Show 8-10 headlines with their source and a one-sentence summary. Group by topic if diverse.
